query:
-- 確認 5 個指定帳號都存在
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 5 THEN '✓ 5個帳號全部存在' ELSE CONCAT('✗ 只有 ', COUNT(*), ' 個帳號') END as status
FROM users 
WHERE role = 'user' 
AND email IN (
  'support@care580.org',
  'garden.vc.tw@gmail.com',
  'yu.hr523@gmail.com',
  'jacob.wang0419@gmail.com',
  'bookesther1@gmail.com'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.9cbf5414b428 --database CMgr35KntT8tLtgpfJPejw --execute
